phase1.name: Push-up
phase1.form_cues: Hands shoulder-width, elbows 45° from body, lower chest to ~2 cm from floor, full lockout at top
phase1.progression: Standard → feet elevated → archer push-ups → add DB row superset

phase1.name: DB Goblet Squat
phase1.form_cues: Hold 1 DB at chest, feet shoulder-width, knees track over toes, sit back not just down, chest up
phase1.progression: 10 kg → 14 kg → 21 kg → pause at bottom 3 sec

phase1.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
phase1.form_cues: Hinge at hips, soft knee bend, DBs travel close to legs, feel hamstring stretch at bottom, drive hips forward at top

phase1.name: DB Bent-over Row
phase1.form_cues: Hinge 45°, DBs hang, pull elbows to hips, squeeze shoulder blades at top, controlled negative

phase1.name: DB Shoulder Press
phase1.form_cues: Seated or standing, DBs at ear height, press straight up, slight forward lean, no flare

phase1.name: DB Bicep Curl
phase1.form_cues: Elbows pinned to sides, full ROM, 3 sec negative, no body swing
phase1.progression: 8 kg → 12 kg → 16 kg → hammer curl superset

phase1.name: Plank
phase1.form_cues: Forearms down, body flat, glutes squeezed, hips don't sag or pike, breathe normally

phase1.name: Dead Bug
phase1.form_cues: Lower back pressed into mat, extend opposite arm and leg, breathe out on extension, never lose lower back contact
phase1.progression: Bodyweight → add 2 kg DB in extended hand

phase1.name: DB Lateral Raise
phase1.form_cues: Slight forward lean, raise to shoulder height, thumbs slightly down, 3 sec descent, no momentum
phase1.progression: 4 kg → 8 kg → 12 kg → 4 sec up / 4 sec down tempo

phase1.name: Hip Thrust (mat)
phase1.form_cues: Upper back on mat edge, feet flat, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, hold 1 sec, lower controlled
phase1.progression: Bodyweight → DB on hips → two DBs → pause variant

phase2_upper.name: DB Bench Press
phase2_upper.form_cues: Lie on mat, DBs at chest, press up and slightly in, lower with control, slight arch in lower back
phase2_upper.progression: 10 kg → 14 kg → 18 kg → pause at chest 2 sec

phase2_upper.name: DB Row
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hinge 45°, pull elbows to hips, squeeze at top, 3 sec negative

phase2_upper.name: Incline Push-up
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hands on elevated surface (chair height), body straight, elbows 45° from body
phase2_upper.progression: Chair height → lower surface → deficit push-up

phase2_upper.name: DB Shoulder Press
phase2_upper.form_cues: DBs at ear height, press straight up, control the descent

phase2_upper.name: DB Lateral Raise
phase2_upper.form_cues: Slight forward lean, raise to shoulder height, 3 sec descent, no momentum

phase2_upper.name: DB Bicep Curl
phase2_upper.form_cues: Elbows pinned, full ROM, 3 sec negative

phase2_upper.name: DB Tricep Overhead Extension
phase2_upper.form_cues: Hold 1 DB with both hands overhead, elbows close to head, lower DB behind head, press back up

phase2_upper.name: Face Pull (towel/band)
phase2_upper.muscle_group: Rear deltoid, external rotators, upper traps
phase2_upper.form_cues: Pull to face level, elbows high and wide, external rotate at end of movement

phase2_lower.name: DB Goblet Squat
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hold 1 DB at chest, feet shoulder-width, knees track over toes, full depth, chest up

phase2_lower.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hinge at hips, feel hamstring stretch at bottom, drive hips forward

phase2_lower.name: DB Reverse Lunge
phase2_lower.form_cues: Step back, lower back knee toward floor, keep front shin vertical, push through front heel to return

phase2_lower.name: Hip Thrust
phase2_lower.form_cues: Upper back on mat, DB on hips, drive up, squeeze glutes at top, hold 1 sec
phase2_lower.progression: DB on hips: 12 kg → 16 kg → 21 kg

phase2_lower.name: DB Calf Raise
phase2_lower.form_cues: Stand on edge of step, full range of motion, hold at top 1 sec

phase2_lower.name: Plank
phase2_lower.form_cues: Forearms down, body flat, glutes squeezed, breathe normally
phase2_lower.progression: 60 sec → RKC plank → plank with reach

phase2_lower.name: Hanging Leg Raise
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90°, control the descent, don't swing
phase2_lower.progression: Knee raises → straight leg raises → L-sit hold

phase2_lower.name: Bicycle Crunches
phase2_lower.form_cues: Hands behind head, rotate elbow to opposite knee, extend other leg, slow and controlled
phase2_lower.progression: Slow tempo → add hold at peak contraction

phase1_additions.name: Band Pull-Apart
phase1_additions.form_cues: Hold band at chest width, palms down. Pull apart until straight line across chest, squeeze shoulder blades hard, 2 sec hold, controlled return. Arms stay at shoulder height.
phase1_additions.progression: Light band → medium → heavy → 4 sec hold at end
phase1_additions.why_band: Fills rear-delt gap dumbbells can't address. Counters anterior chain dominance.

phase1_additions.name: Band Face Pull
phase1_additions.muscle_group: Rear delts, upper traps, external rotators
phase1_additions.form_cues: Grip band thumbs-up in W position. Pull to forehead, elbows high and flared ≥90°. Externally rotate at end — wrists end up behind ears. Hold 1 sec. Elbows never drop below shoulder height.
phase1_additions.progression: Light 15 reps → medium 12 → heavy 10 → 4 sec slow return
phase1_additions.why_band: Ascending resistance — hardest at full contraction — exactly what rotator cuff work needs.
phase1_additions.anchor: door handle or post at face height

phase1_additions.name: Banded Hip Thrust
phase1_additions.form_cues: Loop band just above knees. Upper back on mat edge, feet flat. Actively push knees out against band throughout. Drive hips to full extension, posterior tilt at top, hold 1 sec.
phase1_additions.progression: Band only → band + 8 kg DB → band + 16 kg DB → 3 sec pause at top
phase1_additions.why_band: Adds abduction resistance — 30% higher glute med activation vs standard hip thrust (2019 EMG study).

phase1_additions.name: Banded Lateral Walk
phase1_additions.form_cues: Band above knees or at ankles. Half squat position throughout, toes slightly out. Step sideways controlled — don't let feet fully meet. Maintain upright torso. Keep tension constant.
phase1_additions.progression: Band above knees → below knees → at ankles → heavier band at ankles
phase1_additions.why_band: Glute med weakness is #1 cause of IT band syndrome and runner's knee in beginners.
phase1_additions.anchor: none — loop above knees or around ankles

phase1_additions.name: Banded Push-Up
phase1_additions.form_cues: Loop band across upper back, hold ends under palms. Standard push-up form. Band adds peak resistance at lockout where bodyweight drops off.
phase1_additions.progression: Light band 12 reps → medium 10 → heavy 8 → explosive reps
phase1_additions.why_band: Ascending force curve — constant tension throughout ROM increases time under tension.
phase1_additions.anchor: across upper back — hold ends under palms

phase1_additions.name: Banded Goblet Squat
phase1_additions.form_cues: Loop band just above knees. Hold DB at chest as normal. Actively push knees out against band throughout descent and ascent — cues correct knee tracking.
phase1_additions.progression: Light band + 10 kg DB → medium band + 16 kg → heavy band + 21 kg → 3 sec pause at bottom
phase1_additions.why_band: Forces valgus correction and pre-activates glute med before the squat load.

phase2_upper_additions.name: Band Chest Fly
phase2_upper_additions.form_cues: Anchor band at chest height behind you. One end per hand. Slight elbow bend, arc hands together in front of chest. Control return — 3 sec eccentric. Hands meet at centre, don't cross.
phase2_upper_additions.progression: Light band → step further from anchor → heavier band → 3 sec hold at peak
phase2_upper_additions.why_band: Full horizontal adduction ROM — the movement the chest is anatomically designed for. Completes chest development alongside DB bench.
phase2_upper_additions.anchor: door handle or post at chest height, face away

phase2_upper_additions.name: Band Tricep Pushdown
phase2_upper_additions.form_cues: Anchor band above head. Elbows pinned to sides at 90°. Push hands down to full extension, squeeze 1 sec. Controlled return. Don't let elbows flare. Slight forward hip lean.
phase2_upper_additions.progression: Light band → medium → heavy → single arm
phase2_upper_additions.why_band: Hits lateral and medial heads with peak contraction at full extension. Completes tricep development alongside DB overhead extension.
phase2_upper_additions.anchor: door frame or high anchor point overhead

phase2_upper_additions.name: Band Pull-Apart Warm-Up
phase2_upper_additions.form_cues: Same as pull-apart. Do this before your first pressing exercise as a prehab superset with face pull.
phase2_upper_additions.progression: Consistency over intensity — this is activation, not a work set
phase2_upper_additions.why_band: Activates rotator cuff before heavy DB bench and shoulder press — reduces shoulder impingement risk.

phase2_lower_additions.name: Banded Romanian Deadlift
phase2_lower_additions.form_cues: Stand on band, hold both ends alongside DBs. Standard RDL form. Band adds resistance at hip extension — the hardest point. Maintain neutral spine — don't let band pull you forward at bottom.
phase2_lower_additions.progression: Light band + 16 kg DB → medium band + 18 kg → heavy band + 18 kg → single leg
phase2_lower_additions.why_band: Creates peak load at lockout — demands hip extension harder than DBs alone.
phase2_lower_additions.anchor: stand on centre of band — hold both ends

phase2_lower_additions.name: Banded Lateral Walk + Clamshell Superset
phase2_lower_additions.form_cues: Lateral walk: band above knees, half squat, step sideways. Clamshells: lie on side, band above knees, hips stacked, rotate top knee up without rolling hips back. Hold 1 sec, lower controlled.
phase2_lower_additions.progression: Light band above knees → heavier band → band at ankles for walk
phase2_lower_additions.why_band: Full abductor/external rotator complex — prevents 80% of running injuries in beginners.
